'''dakuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaffbag|chaffbag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaffbag|chaffbag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dakuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dækiyith|dækiyith]] || [[word:dækiyij|dækiyij]] || [[word:dækiyish|dækiyish]] || [[word:dækiyi|dækiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakukuyuth|dakukuyuth]] || [[word:dakukuyuj|dakukuyuj]] || [[word:dakukuyush|dakukuyush]] || [[word:dakukuyu|dakukuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakuyuth|dakuyuth]] || [[word:dakuyuj|dakuyuj]] || [[word:dakuyush|dakuyush]] || [[word:dakuyu|dakuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakufyuth|dakufyuth]] || [[word:dakufyuj|dakufyuj]] || [[word:dakufyush|dakufyush]] || [[word:dakufyuf|dakufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dakuyuthu|dakuyuthu]] || [[word:dakuyuju|dakuyuju]] || [[word:dakuyushu|dakuyushu]] || [[word:dakuyuku|dakuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dakuyuth|dakuyuth]] || [[word:dakuyuj|dakuyuj]] || [[word:dakuyush|dakuyush]] || [[word:dakuyu|dakuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dakuyuthul|dakuyuthul]] || [[word:dakuyujul|dakuyujul]] || [[word:dakuyushul|dakuyushul]] || [[word:dakuyukul|dakuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dakuyuthuthu|dakuyuthuthu]] || [[word:dakuyujuju|dakuyujuju]] || [[word:dakuyushushu|dakuyushushu]] || [[word:dakuyuku|dakuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dakuyuthun|dakuyuthun]] || [[word:dakuyujun|dakuyujun]] || [[word:dakuyushun|dakuyushun]] || [[word:dakuyukun|dakuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dakuyuthuoro|dakuyuthuoro]] || [[word:dakuyujuoro|dakuyujuoro]] || [[word:dakuyushuoro|dakuyushuoro]] || [[word:dakuyukuoro|dakuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
